/usr/bin/ar qc libpretext_core.a CMakeFiles/pretext_core.dir/cpp/pretext/analysis.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pretext_core.dir/cpp/pretext/bidi.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pretext_core.dir/cpp/pretext/fonts/measure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pretext_core.dir/cpp/pretext/fonts/registry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pretext_core.dir/cpp/pretext/fonts/sfnt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pretext_core.dir/cpp/pretext/fonts/shorthand.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pretext_core.dir/cpp/pretext/layout.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pretext_core.dir/cpp/pretext/line_break.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pretext_core.dir/cpp/pretext/line_text.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pretext_core.dir/cpp/pretext/measurement.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pretext_core.dir/cpp/pretext/rich_inline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pretext_core.dir/cpp/pretext/segmenter/grapheme.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pretext_core.dir/cpp/pretext/segmenter/word.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libpretext_core.a
